sensoryProfile.sight: Amber canopy, deep gold light, fern-choked ground, and a forest curated enough that even its wildness feels maintained.
sensoryProfile.sound: Birdsong returning after the kill, hoofbeats under trees, tack whispering more than clattering, and the low bodily hum of the ward network.
sensoryProfile.smell: Crushed fern, troll blood, green sweetness, and the faint ozone of ward-magic.
sensoryProfile.touch: Soft track under hooves, cooling forest air after combat, and the steady pressure of the wards felt through teeth and tongue.
sensoryProfile.atmosphere: Homeland confidence: beautiful, controlled, and defended so thoroughly that Sylvanas treats it as the shape of normal life.

establishedFacts.fact: This southeastern stretch is active Farstrider patrol ground under routine Amani pressure.
The woods are not generic wilderness; they feel curated and intimately known by the riders moving through them.
The ward network is part of the landscape here, familiar enough that trained riders and horses move with it without conscious effort.

eventsHere.event: Sylvanas kills the last Amani raider and takes one more stolen hour of patrol instead of returning directly to the Convocation.
The runner intercepts the patrol with news of a detained human mage at the border.
